notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Jorge Mateo to first baseman Matt Olson. Austin Hedges out at 2nd. Steven Kwan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan steals (2) 2nd base. Steven Kwan scores. Wild pitch by pitcher Osvaldo Bido. Throwing error by catcher Jonah Heim.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan steals (2) 2nd base. Steven Kwan scores. Wild pitch by pitcher Osvaldo Bido. Throwing error by catcher Jonah Heim.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez steals (4) 3rd base. José Ramírez steals (4) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann singles on a line drive to center fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Angel Martínez scores. José Ramírez scores.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds out, second baseman Juan Brito to first baseman Rhys Hoskins.
